\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
3D stratified (layered) medium domain. 

Responsibilities on top of \doxylink{classDomain}{Domain}\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Keep per‑layer material parameters and interface z‑positions.
\item Build per‑layer homogeneous Green\textquotesingle{}s functions plus a layered Green\textquotesingle{}s function with Sommerfeld integration (tabulated on problem‑dependent grids).
\item Partition arbitrary point sets into layer‑consistent groups (slice).
\item Compute tabulation ranges and grids (calculate\+Range, compute\+Grid).
\item Provide layered incident sources (\doxylink{classPlaneWave}{Plane\+Wave}, \doxylink{classDipole}{Dipole}, \doxylink{classGaussian}{Gaussian}).
\item Post‑processing\+: scattered/total fields and cross sections with layered Green\textquotesingle{}s function. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Constructs a 3D layered domain with given material properties and geometry. 

This constructor initializes the domain with the provided surface mesh, domain index, permittivity, permeability, and interface positions. It also calculates the layer thicknesses, reads positional data, slices points, computes the tabulation grids, and initializes the Green\textquotesingle{}s function.


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em in\+Mesh} & Pointer to the surface mesh. \\
\hline

\hline
{\em in\+Mu} & Vector of relative permeability values for each layer. \\
\hline
{\em in\+ZVals} & Vector of Z-\/coordinates defining the layer interfaces. \\
\hline
{\em in\+Vacuum\+Wavelength} & The wavelength in vacuum. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}

\Hypertarget{classDomainLayered3D_a4e4355cfe34e6edd8e3587df4b5b115f}\index{DomainLayered3D@{DomainLayered3D}!ClearIncidentFields@{ClearIncidentFields}}
\index{ClearIncidentFields@{ClearIncidentFields}!DomainLayered3D@{DomainLayered3D}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{ClearIncidentFields()}{ClearIncidentFields()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classDomainLayered3D_a4e4355cfe34e6edd8e3587df4b5b115f} 
int Domain\+Layered3\+D\+::\+Clear\+Incident\+Fields (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}{}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [override]}, {\ttfamily [virtual]}}



Clears all incident fields and resets the cached layered Green\textquotesingle{}s function for field evaluation. 

This method first calls the base class implementation to clear the $ \text{incidentFields} $ list (deleting the \doxylink{classDipole}{Dipole} objects). It then deletes and nullifies the $ \text{grnFunLayeredFields} $ pointer. This is crucial because \doxylink{classDipole}{Dipole} objects are recreated for each subjob, but the \doxylink{classDomain}{Domain} object persists. Resetting $ \text{grnFunLayeredFields} $ forces $ \text{SimJob} $ to call $ \text{newGrnFunLayered()} $ again, which correctly wires the new \doxylink{classDipole}{Dipole} sources. 

Reimplemented from \mbox{\hyperlink{classDomain_a3740efee36b6693e4fda2bc916552efd}{Domain}}.
